texto: I am optimistic and confident in all that I do. I affirm only the best for myself and others. I am the creator of my life and my world. I meet daily challenges gracefully and with complete confidence. I fill my mind with positive nurturing and healing thoughts.
explicacao: Citação de Alice Potter sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I am optimistic and confident in all that I do. I affirm only the best for myself and others. I a…” articula reflexao, positive, optimistic em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
